entries.main_competence: 1.0 Apply knowledge of Physics in various contexts
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles of Physics
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concept and principles of light (sources of light, propagation and transmission, image formation, colours, optical instruments)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the concepts and principles of light (sources of light, propagation and transmission, image formation, colours, optical instruments)
Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to explore the concepts and principles of light
Field trip: Organise field trips help students to explore applications of light
entries.assessment: The concepts and principles of light are described correctly
resources: light emitting diodes and fluorescent tube
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Apply knowledge of Physics in various contexts
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles of Physics
entries.learning_activity: (b) Describe the concept and principles of magnetism (magnetization and demagnetization, magnetic fields)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students to discuss the concepts and principles of magnetism through hands-on activities
ICT based learning: Guide the students through the use of interactive simulations and animations to visualise magnetic field patterns
Project work: Guide students in groups to work on different projects on magnetization and demagnetization of different materials
entries.assessment: The concepts and principles of magnetism are described correctly
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Apply knowledge of Physics in various contexts
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles of Physics
entries.learning_activity: (c) Explain the concept and principles of static electricity (detection of static charges, types of materials, capacitors, charge distributions and lightning conductor)
teaching_learning_activities: Practical Work and Experiment: Guide learners to explore the concepts and principles of static electricity through hands-on activities.
Interactive simulations Facilitate students to visualize and understand the concepts and principles of static electricity
Brainstorming: Guide students to explore the application of static electricity in their environment
entries.assessment: The concepts and principles of static electricity are clearly explained
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Apply knowledge of Physics in various contexts
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles of Physics
entries.learning_activity: (d) Describe the concept and laws of current electricity (electromotive force, potential difference, resistance, effect of electric current, domestic electrical installation)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in groups to discuss the concept of current electricity
Hands-on activity: Guide learners to explore the concept and laws of current electricity through hands-on activities.
Interactive simulations: Facilitate students to visualize the flow of charges
entries.assessment: The concept and laws of current electricity are described correctly
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Apply knowledge of Physics in various contexts
entries.specific_competence: 1.2 Use mathematics to explain physical principles and phenomena
entries.learning_activity: (a) Apply mathematical knowledge to describe various relations related to light and current electricity
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students through manageable groups to apply mathematical knowledge to describe various relations related to light and current electricity
Think ink pair share: Guide students through think ink pair share to apply mathematical knowledge to describe various relations related to light and current electricity
Problem based learning: Guide students to relate the principles related to light and current electricity with real-life situation.
entries.assessment: Mathematical knowledge is applied correctly to describe various relations related to light and current electricity
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct experiments in Physics
entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic experimental skills in Physics
entries.learning_activity: (a) Carry out experiments related to light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity
teaching_learning_activities: Practical works: Guide students through hands-on activities to investigate relationship between different parameters related to light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity
ICT based approach: Guide students through interactive simulations to visualize and carry out experiments related to light, magnetism, static electricity, and current electricity
entries.assessment: Experiments related to light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity are carried out correctly
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct experiments in Physics
entries.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate mastery of data analysis, presentation and report writing in Physics
entries.learning_activity: (a) Use spreadsheet to process experimental data in physics
teaching_learning_activities: ICT based approach: Guide students through the use of ICT-programs such as spreadsheet to process experimental data in Physics
Experimentation: Guide students through experiments to deduce the relationship between various parameters related to light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity
entries.assessment: Experimental data are correctily processed using various spread sheet programs
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct experiments in Physics
entries.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate mastery of data analysis, presentation and report writing in Physics
entries.learning_activity: (b) Use graphs to analyse and determine mathematical relationships between various variables in Physics
teaching_learning_activities: ICT based approach: Guide students through interactive simulations to collect and analyse the experimental data using graphs and use the graphs to establish the mathematical relationships between various variables in Physics

Group discussion: Facilitate the students through manageable groups to discuss the use of graphs to analyse the experimental data and use it to establish the relationship between the variables in Physics
entries.assessment: The graphs are used appropriately to analyse and determine mathematical relationships between various variables in Physics
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct experiments in Physics
entries.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate mastery of data analysis, presentation and report writing in Physics
entries.learning_activity: (c) Communicate experimental results orally
teaching_learning_activities: Cooperative learning: Guide students to work in pairs or small groups to analyse and interpret graphs
Problem-based learning: Guide students with real-world problems that require them to analyse and interpret graphs to determine the mathematical relationship between variables
Guided practice approach: Facilitate students with guided practice in analysing and interpreting graphs
entries.assessment: The experimental results are communicate orally correctly
resources: Variuos graphs based on experimental data and Online resources
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 3.0 Evaluate and use information in Physics
entries.specific_competence: 3.1 Collect, describe and relate physical data
entries.learning_activity: (a) Collect and analyse data to explain various physical quantities (light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity)
teaching_learning_activities: Problem-solving approach: Guide students with real-world problems that require them to analyse collected physics data to explain various physical quantities
Collaborative learning: Guide the students to work in pairs or small groups to analyse and interpret collected Physics data

ICT-based approach: Guide students through the use of technology such as computer software, online tools, and simulations to analyse and interpret collected data to explain various physical quantities
entries.assessment: Collected physics data are correctly analysed to explain various physical quantities
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 3.0 Evaluate and use information in Physics
entries.specific_competence: 3.1 Collect, describe and relate physical data
entries.learning_activity: (b) Collect and analyse data to explain experimental observations related to light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity
teaching_learning_activities: Experimentation: Guide students to use electrical equipment and light locally available materials to design experiments to investigate the properties of light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity

ICT-based approach: Guide students through the use of technology such as computer software, online tools, and simulations to analyse and interpret collected data to explain various physical quantities
entries.assessment: Collected physics data are correctly analysed to explain experimental observations related to light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 3.0 Evaluate and use information in Physics

teaching_learning_activities: Experimentation: Guide students to use electrical equipment and light locally available materials to design experiments to investigate the properties of light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity

ICT-based approach: Guide students through the use of technology such as computer software, online tools, and simulations to analyse and interpret collected data to explain various physical quantities
entries.assessment: Collected physics data are correctly analysed to explain experimental observations related to light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 3.0 Evaluate and use information in Physics
entries.specific_competence: 3.2 Carry out a project in Physics
entries.learning_activity: (a) Develop prototype devices based on the concepts, theories, principles, and laws gained from the field of light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity
teaching_learning_activities: Inquiry-based approach: Guide the students to develop prototype devices based on the concepts, theories, principles, and laws gained from the field of light, magnetism, static electricity and current electricity
Problem-based approach: Guide the students in discussion to present the way the developed prototypes real world problems related to light and electricity
entries.assessment: Appropriate prototype devices are developed based on the concepts, theories, principles, and laws gained from given Physics concepts
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)
